Hello, I’m currently in this situation:  
I received a ban after requesting a refund due to a payment error, even though I followed Apple's instructions and acted in good faith.  

I’ve already submitted a support request with detailed explanations and evidence, but it seems the support team hasn’t reviewed it yet.  

Does anyone have any suggestions on how to get the support team to check the case more quickly?  
Any help or advice would be greatly appreciated!

my mom always makes boiled eggs and vegetables and I have never eat them, they taste horrible, its not personal
Probably just your taste buds, I don't like boiled eggs much either
But oddly enough, I like having them on dry noodles (especially if it's on the spicier end)
sounds like salad/sides more than main dish
Yeah, I get the same feeling
imagine its my lunch time and my momma said “here is your lunch, only boiled eggs and veggies”
no offense but i wont get full
Boiled eggs are toppings and vegetables as the main taste like salad variants
Like is he allergic to the meat?
Like, my mom does have shellfish allergies so she cannot have prawn, shrimp, lobsters, etc
I dont like those, but it has to suck that you cant eat something you want to
At least with lactose intolerance, I am still able to physically have dairy products around me and eat it
And I can get away with simply extended time spent in the bath/washrooms
But like with a shellfish allergy, you can neither have any nearby (can get rashes and shit) nor eat it (fucks up your digestive systems)
Just a light tap on the wrist
I mean, it cant be that bad
there are things that are more "light" than others but i dont know that much
as long as you dont dehydrate yourself
That's why I have 9 glasses of water minimum a day
2 to 4 liters. urine should be an indicator, but better if you have just more water
